name: Alaska Sim 72 Golf (previously Divots Golf Anchorage)
about: Alaska Sim 72 is an indoor golf facility in Anchorage offering year-round access to golf through high-tech simulator bays. The venue uses 6 state-of-the-art TruGolf Apogee sim paired with E6 Connect software, providing players with access to over 100 courses worldwide. Pricing is based on bay rental, with rates starting at $50 per hour for up to 6 players. The facility includes a lounge area with a big screen for sporting events and a pro shop offering club repair services.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round access to golf regardless of weather
State-of-the-art TruGolf Apogee technology for accurate shot tracking
Ability to bring in food and order delivery for a comfortable social experience
Variety of leagues and events to compete and improve skills
Comprehensive amenities including a pro shop and bar

food_and_drink.notes: Customers are encouraged to bring or order food for delivery
Beer and wine options available for purchase on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: Ceiling-mounted launch monitor using ultra-high-speed stereoscopic cameras; no specialty balls or marked clubs required

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not specify whether rental clubs are available, so it is recommended that players bring their own clubs for the best experience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, you are encouraged to bring your own food or order delivery. A selection of beer, wine, and non-alcoholic beverages is also available for purchase on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide a specific time for an 18-hole round, as it can vary greatly depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Alaska Sim 72 is family-friendly and a suitable environment for children to experience golf in a high-tech setting.
